1769710.name: CUSTOM ORDER MAID 3D2 It's a Night Magic +GP02
1769710.description:
1.Become even more intimate with your maid with the marriage system!
After fulfilling the requirements such as likability at the facility "Cathedral," you will be able to proceed from the "lover" relationship to "bride" with your maid.

2.There are two sets of wedding-themed dresses newly included.

3.Private maid mode
See one of your favorite maids in a variety of everyday scenes and enjoy the conversations and life around the Empire Club!

4.Empire life mode
New events are added to Empire life mode.

5.A new three-person dance song
remember to dearest

A scenario that leads to a dance song is included as a continuation of the main story's idol route.
A new three-person dance song

"Dan! Gan! Party!!"

A new additional three-person dance. There is also an additional idol route.

6.Pole dance
A new additional pole dance with three people.

7.Background
Two new backgrounds "Cathedral" and "Newlywed's Private Room" have been added.

8.My room custom parts
My room custom parts are added.

The costumes included in this DLC are compatible with both the High Poly Body and Normal Body.
You can use them in both COM3D2 and COM3D2.5.
